title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-20
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Greenhouse, freshly measured
gist.blurb: The bot made its daily walk through the app garden, counting sprouts and checking which leaves are still pointed at the sun.
gist.summary: Automated daily refresh of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in apps/APPS.md and apps/GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Maintainers get an up-to-date view of the community app garden and its health without changing app behavior.
gist.visual_concept: Polly acts as a tiny garden inspector with a clipboard, checking labeled code-plants in a cozy greenhouse while a CRT monitor robot reads health charts. The refreshed metrics are represented by healthy sprouts, small status tags, and a prominently lime-green dashboard glow.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny gardener visor, checking code-plants with a clipboard inside a warm community greenhouse while a chunky CRT monitor robot displays simple lime green (#ecf874) health charts. Flowers, vines, seed packets, and softly glowing status signs surround them; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny gardener visor, checking code-plants with a clipboard inside a warm community greenhouse while a chunky CRT monitor robot displays simple lime green (#ecf874) health charts. Flowers, vines, seed packets, and softly glowing status signs surround them; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
